ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chat_sessions" (
  "chat_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each chat session */,
  "scenario_id" TEXT /* Reference to the scenario related to the chat session */,
  "outcome_id" TEXT /* Reference to the outcome of the chat session */,
  "agent_ids" TEXT /* List of agent IDs involved in the session */,
  "agent_types" TEXT /* List of types of agents involved (human or bot) */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Timestamp indicating the start time of the chat session */,
  "end_time" REAL /* Timestamp indicating the end time of the chat session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the chat session in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the session */,
  "session_rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the session (e.g., on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "resolution_time" REAL /* Time taken to resolve the user's issue, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chat_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chat_sessions_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chat_sessions_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scenario */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the scenario */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last interaction with the chatbot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (human or bot) */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent joined the company */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the agent */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score of the agent based on past interactions */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the outcome */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resolution, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "chat_id" TEXT /* ID of the chat session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the chat session */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Timestamp indicating when the chat session was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the chat session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chat_id FOREIGN KEY ("chat_id") REFERENCES chat_sessions ("chat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
